creator: jholland@vin-dit.org
text:
Unable to complete build of lang/rust on 11.1-RELEASE -p4 poudriere 3.1.21  - build almost finishes and fails on 

thread 'main' panicked at 'command did not execute successfully: "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.21.0-src/build/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/stage0/bin/cargo" "build" "-j" "1" "--target" "x86_64-unknown-freebsd" "-v" "--release" "--frozen" "--features" " jemalloc llvm" "--manifest-path" "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.21.0-src/src/rustc/Cargo.toml" "--message-format" "json"
expected success, got: exit code: 101', src/bootstrap/compile.rs:883:8




see complete build log at

https://pastebin.com/ExQvYVZW  

It does build OK when built directly in /usr/ports (no poudriere)
